title: Redstone Tools
description:
Redstone tools. Including
Axe, Pickaxe, Hoe, Sword
And more! Download if you like redstone. You dont need to though.
body: A mod that Adds redstone tools! Redstone tools arent really wanted But its a thing! Redstone sword is kind in between wooden sword and iron sword So a redstone sword is a stone sword just a little buffed! Redstone pickaxe is also like a stone pickaxe Just more fast at mining stone redstone hoe? We'll ignore that. Redstone Axe Same thing as a- stone axe.. Redstone shovel.. Yea we'll ignore that aswell..
